notes: Ranks are seed priorities for monitoring coverage, not a single audited GMV league table across every country.
Use marketSharePercent only when a cited source publishes comparable share data. Use platformWeight when the source gives rank, GMV or market-leadership language without a full regional denominator.
Amazon is included as both a regional platform where relevant and a global benchmark data source.

sources.title: Momentum Works, Ecommerce in Southeast Asia 2026
sources.observed: SEA platform GMV reached US$157.6B in 2025. Public excerpts name Shopee, TikTok Shop and Lazada as the dominant platforms.

sources.title: Cube Asia, Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop in Southeast Asia
sources.observed: For SEA-6 physical goods GMV across Shopee, TikTok Shop and Lazada, Cube estimates Shopee 59%, TikTok Shop 31%, Lazada 9% in FY 2025.

sources.title: Statista, market share of leading retail e-commerce companies in the United States in 2025
sources.observed: Public search excerpt lists Amazon 40.5%, Walmart 9.2%, Apple 3.2%, Tesla 3.1%.

sources.title: Forbes Advisor, 35 Top E-Commerce Statistics
sources.observed: Public excerpt lists Amazon 37.6%, Walmart 6.4%, Apple 3.6% and eBay 3.0% of U.S. ecommerce sales.

sources.title: Lengow, Top Marketplaces in the EU
sources.observed: Public excerpt says Amazon and eBay together capture more than half of marketplace-driven turnover in Europe and cites EU marketplace GMV.

sources.title: GlobeNewswire, Europe B2C Ecommerce Market Report 2025
sources.observed: Public excerpt names Amazon as leading core markets while Zalando, Cdiscount, Allegro and Bol.com defend local scale.

sources.title: Lengow, Top African marketplaces
sources.observed: Public excerpt cites ECDB 2025 global retailer ranking: Amazon, Takealot and Jumia lead Africa online retail by GMV, followed by SHEIN, Temu and Noon.

globalDataSources.name: Amazon global benchmark
globalDataSources.role: Use SP-API, Ads API and Brand Analytics exports as the benchmark feed for sales, search, conversion and average order value signals where seller access is available.
globalDataSources.securityNote: Keep Amazon credentials only on the local backend or in a secrets manager. Never publish them to GitHub Pages.
